title: Gate 3 consult prose: bee-validating runs the configured advisor before high-risk execution approval
action: Per plan.md Slice 4 design item 4 and AO2(b)/AO3/AO4: extend bee-validating/SKILL.md's Gate 3 section — BEFORE presenting (or bypass-auto-approving) Gate 3 for a high-risk/hard-gate slice, the orchestrator runs the advisor consult as machinery (bypass levels lift human checkpoints, never this): resolve the advisor from config (resolveAdvisor); cli-shaped -> run the configured command verbatim, read-only, with an evidence bundle on stdin (plan summary, risk map, validation findings, open questions — never session history, never secrets) and capture the digest; model-shaped -> a bee-review-class read-only dispatch with the same bundle; no advisor configured -> record that fact and proceed (AO2 adds one trigger, not a hard dependency on config); then node .bee/bin/bee.mjs state advisor-ref record --advisor <identity> --digest-file <path>. State plainly that Gate 3's execution approval THROWS for high-risk work when the ref is missing/stale (AO13 conditions, listed) — the consult is not optional ceremony, the CLI enforces it. Advice never approves gates and never overrides locked decisions (existing law, cite it). Sync .claude/.agents mirrors (self-onboard). FINAL STEP: node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write, then the cell verify — --check green.

truths: the Gate 3 flow names the consult as pre-approval machinery under every bypass level
cli-shaped and model-shaped advisor transports both documented; unconfigured advisor documented as record-and-proceed
the throw-on-stale enforcement and the four AO13 conditions are stated
prohibitions: no new human checkpoint added (the consult is machinery)
no session-history or secrets in the evidence bundle
no edits outside bounded files (release-manifest.json only via release_manifest.mjs --write)

trace.outcome: Extended bee-validating/SKILL.md Gate 3 section with the AO2b/AO3/AO4 advisor-consult prose: resolveAdvisor branch (cli-shaped verbatim command + stdin evidence bundle / model-shaped bee-review dispatch / unconfigured -> record-and-proceed), the state advisor-ref record verb, the throw-on-stale AO13 four conditions verbatim, and advice-never-approves + locked-decision supremacy. Added two Red Flags rows. Synced .claude/.agents mirrors byte-identical and regenerated release-manifest.json.
